title: Acadia's Q3 Earnings Beat, Nuplazid & Daybue Drive Revenue Growth
text: ACAD Q3 2024 Earnings Beat Summary. EPS Performance: Acadia Pharmaceuticals exceeded analyst expectations with third-quarter 2024 earnings of 20 cents per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of 13 cents. This represented a significant improvement compared to a year-earlier loss of 40 cents per share. Revenue Results: Total revenues reached $250 million, marginally surpassing the consensus estimate of $249 million. The company achieved total revenues jumped 18% year over year. Product-Specific Performance: Nuplazid (pimavanserin): Revenue increased to $159.2 million, up 10% annually, driven by 7% volume growth. Daybue (trofinetide): Generated $91.2 million in sales, representing 36% year-over-year growth. Key Business Update: In November 2024, the company announced a definitive agreement to sell its Rare Pediatric Disease Priority Review Voucher for $150 million. Updated 2024 Guidance: Acadia narrowed its full-year revenue outlook to $940-$960 million.
